sections.instruction: Questions 1-4: Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 5-10: Choose the correct letter A, B or C.

questions.content: What will keep the apartment cool in summer?
The rent for the new apartment is
Brook will pay the rent by
Which utility is included in the rent?

questions.content: Which map shows the correct location of the police station (marked P)?

sections.instruction: Questions 21-27: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 28-30: Complete the summary below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

questions.content:
Research proposal – key elements
• An effective (21) {{BLANK}} – keep it brief
• Abstract – i.e. (22) {{BLANK}} of my research
• Introduction and/ or (23) {{BLANK}} – relevant books and articles – show similarities to my theory but also how it is (24) {{BLANK}}
• Methods – work plan: outline (25) {{BLANK}} ; participants, samples etc.
• Discussion (of (26) {{BLANK}} ) – significance of findings and future use; also any weaknesses
• (27) {{BLANK}} – participants’ consent and approval from Ethics Committee
Archie should consider three things: what he wants to (28) {{BLANK}} ; why he wants to do it and how he is going to carry it out. He should pay attention to organization; maintain (29) {{BLANK}} ; and not repeat himself unnecessarily. Correct citation is important as is style. He needs to have a clear sense of direction and reserve details for (30) {{BLANK}}

sections.instruction: Questions 31-36: Match the hat color in the box to the descriptions below. Choose your answers from the box and write the letters A-F next to questions 31-36. Questions 37-40: Complete the flow chart below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.

questions.content:
The Stepladder Technique
Step 1: (37) {{BLANK}} members presented with task
Step 2: a (38) {{BLANK}} of two members is created
Step 3: 3rd member added; discuss (39) {{BLANK}} together
Step 4: repeat the process adding the 4th member
Step 5: all members reach a (40) {{BLANK}}
